topic: CP trajectory for Community vs Nathan Young question
summary: CP at 86% as of Feb 6, above 82% threshold since Jan 31, upward trend with 151 forecasters
content: Meta-question 42014 asks if CP for question 41508 (question_id 41255) will be above 82% on Feb 14. Current CP: 86%. Buffer: 4 points. CP has been above 82% continuously since Jan 31. Trend is upward from 80% to 86% over 2 weeks. 151 forecasters provide stability. Max drawdown in last 50 observations: 3%. The CP would need to drop 4+ points in 8 days with 151 forecasters, which is unlikely given current stability.
